description: Downgrade misleading PASS equivalence and split adapter-boundary proof from full autonomous runtime proof. Add explicit gaps as executable requirements.
acceptance: Benchmark distinguishes adapter-boundary PASS from full autonomous coding runtime PARTIAL/MISS.
Tests prevent future blanket Ralph/OMX equivalence overclaim.

evidence.summary: Corrected Ralph/OMX benchmark overclaim: full autonomous runtime and equivalence are PARTIAL until default adapters/artifacts/followups/resume/ship policy are proven. Added regression test preventing blanket PASS equivalence claim. Verification: pytest -q and make check passed.
